data.body: REMEDIATED AC4/AC6: implemented the runtime size-handling ladder in orchestrator._pass1_with_ladder — batch → one-criterion-per-call (on a context-limit signal) → escalate up MODEL_LADDER → BLOCKING too-big failure finding if a single criterion won't fit the largest window. Ladder trace recorded on coverage['size_ladder']. P8 remains the static pre-run budget check; this adds the dynamic fallback the ACs require. Tests: context-error classifier, model ladder, batch→one-per-call, too-big blocking finding.
